news:news.news:title: China's intervention in the Iran conflict raises questions about its role as a peacemaker amid ongoing global tensions.
news:news.news:keywords: China's role in global diplomacy, Israel-Lebanon conflict updates, Hungary's political landscape, Russian military incidents, South Africa's crime response

news:news.news:title: Oil prices have dropped while stock markets have risen amid hopes for an end to the Middle East conflict, despite warnings of economic impacts.
news:news.news:keywords: Oil price fluctuations, Impact of Middle East conflict on markets, Job cuts in tech sector, US fuel price trends, Millionaire tax implications in Washington

news:news.news:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale has ended, but some deals remain available as consumers rush to save before price increases on gaming consoles.
news:news.news:keywords: Amazon Spring Sale 2026, April Fools' Day technology pranks, Baidu robotaxi operational issues, AI integration in gaming devices, PS5 design controversy

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods announced he is stepping away from golf to seek treatment following his recent arrest, while the men's Final Four approaches with notable player rankings.
news:news.news:keywords: Tiger Woods treatment announcement, men's Final Four player rankings, Luka Doncic scoring record, U.S. soccer team performance, Italy World Cup qualification failure

news:news.news:title: Recent scientific discoveries range from advancements in drug treatments for shift workers to insights into ancient marine life and the evolution of squid.
news:news.news:keywords: impact of caffeine on behavior, new drug for shift work disorder, discoveries in marine biology, evolution of squid, cellular mechanisms in cancer

news:news.news:title: Iran is reportedly using children in security roles amid ongoing conflicts, raising serious humanitarian concerns.
news:news.news:keywords: Middle East conflict updates, Iran child security roles, Lebanon peacekeeper casualties, India census 2026, Chiang Mai air pollution health risks

news:news.news:title: US average fuel prices exceed $4 per gallon for the first time in four years amid ongoing conflict in Iran, impacting markets and consumer sentiment.
news:news.news:keywords: US fuel prices and market impact, Iran conflict and economic implications, Federal funding for public broadcasting, Millionaire tax in Washington state, OpenAI profitability and IPO prospects

news:news.news:title: Amazon's Big Spring Sale offers significant discounts on various tech products, while new AI developments continue to emerge in the technology sector.
news:news.news:keywords: Amazon Big Spring Sale discounts, AI advancements in technology, smart home devices deals

news:news.news:title: Tiger Woods is stepping away from golf to seek treatment following his recent arrest, while the U.S. soccer team struggles with a loss to Portugal.
